texto: Forty-five years, these people were provided for. Not with much, you understand, but there weren't beggars in the streets or homeless people. Now everyone must figure out a new way to make a living. Selling hats or popcorn or flowers or coffee, there's not much difference. They're scared.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Annie Ward sobre temas ligados a vida. A afirmação “Forty-five years, these people were provided for. Not with much, you understand, but there weren'…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, bulgaria, capitalism, útil em momentos de capitalism.

Now everyone must figure out a new way to make a living. Selling hats or popcorn or flowers or coffee, there's not much difference. They're scared.

texto: It's a tradition to drink rakia with snacks. Not like the Russians, you know, who just drink to get drunk. I like a little snack with the news.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Annie Ward: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “It's a tradition to drink rakia with snacks. Not like the Russians, you know, who just drink to g…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, bulgaria, drinking pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de drinking e rakia.
